title: OMI Address Derivation v0
description: Normalized object form for OMI address derivation surfaces. The source string may have many aliases, but normalization must produce this shape.

source.description: Original OMI address surface, such as omi-<frame>/<path...>-imo.

frame.description: Primary 128-bit frame identity when present. May be hyphenated 8x16-bit or compact 32-hex form.

frames.description: One or more frames for composed surfaces such as omi<frame><frame>imo.

path.description: Slash-delimited derivation path segments, interpreted as Horn-clause selectors.

derivation.description: Classified derivation fields such as depth, domain, selector, overlay, modality, or f-expression.

clauses.description: Derived clause facts or Horn-clause selectors produced from the path.

payload.description: Optional payload carried by the packet or surface.

receipt.description: Receipt candidate or accepted receipt for the derivation traversal.
